title: UTV2-1020 — Fix R1-R3 always-skip bypass in truth-check

queries.description: R1 R2 R3 skip for non-T1 tier
R1 R2 R3 fail for T1 when --no-runtime is set
R1 R2 R3 fail for T1 when evidence bundle is null
R1 R2 R3 pass for T1 with valid evidence bundle
R1 fails for T1 when queries empty, R2 fails when row_counts empty, R3 fails when verifier identity missing

assertions.claim: R1/R2/R3 previously skipped unconditionally for T1 due to require_phase_contracts = false (field not in LaneManifest type)
assertions.evidence: git grep on LaneManifest interface confirms require_phase_contracts was not a typed field; always evaluated to false via unsafe cast

assertions.claim: After fix, R1/R2/R3 run unconditionally for T1 lanes with real checks against evidence bundle
assertions.evidence: 5 new test cases in truth-check-lib.test.ts covering: non-T1 skip, --no-runtime fail, null-evidence fail, valid-bundle pass, partial-fail cases — all pass (ok 351-355)

assertions.claim: pnpm verify exits 0 with no regressions
assertions.evidence: 410 tests pass, 0 fail; type-check clean; lint clean; build clean
